title: task
description: fragment.rs:527 - Integer underflow when fragment FCN >= window_size. The calculation 'window_size - 1 - frag.fcn' underflows to a huge usize if a malformed fragment has FCN >= window_size. This causes the tile to be stored at an incorrect index, corrupting reassembly. Failure scenario: Receiver with window_size=7 receives fragment with FCN=10. pos becomes wrapping subtraction result (~2^64-4), global_idx is huge, tile stored at wrong index, reassembly fails or produces garbage.
close_reason: Fixed: Added FCN < window_size validation before pos calculation to prevent integer underflow.
